started.subject: Identity verification in progress — {{community}}
started.title: Identity Verification Started
started.preview: Your identity verification is in progress
started.body: You have started the identity verification process on {{community}}. This usually takes just a few minutes.
started.next_steps: You will receive another email once your verification is complete.
started.note: Your documents are processed securely by Stripe Identity.

passed.subject: Identity verified! — {{community}}
passed.title: Identity Verified
passed.preview: Your identity has been successfully verified
passed.body: Your identity has been successfully verified on {{community}}. A verified member badge has been added to your profile.
passed.badge_note: Your verified badge is now visible to other members.

failed.subject: Identity verification could not be completed — {{community}}
failed.title: Verification Unsuccessful
failed.preview: Your identity verification was not completed
failed.body: We were unable to complete your identity verification on {{community}}.
failed.retry_note: You may try again from your profile settings. If you continue to have issues, please contact support.
